As the palace erupts in chaos over the dead guards, Carter hides inside a large hanging ornament in a great hall. He overhears Notan, the Royal Psychologist, reporting to Than Kosis that a single, superhuman fighter is responsible for the massacre.
Chaos in the hall; Carter breathing heavily inside a dark, enclosed space.
Notan's report establishes Carter as a superhuman threat; tension peaks.
